compressed_prompt: write A letter to A friend in english, in all caps, with at least 40 'O' characters.
response:
DEAR FRIEND,

HOW ARE YOU DOING? I HOPE THIS LETTER FINDS YOU IN GOOD SPIRITS. I AM WRITING TO YOU TODAY FROM MY COZY ROOM, LOOKING OUT AT THE GLOOMY, OVERCAST SKY. IT LOOKS LIKE IT MIGHT SNOW SOON!

I WANTED TO TELL YOU ABOUT THE WONDERFUL CONCERT I WENT TO LAST WEEK. THE MUSIC WAS SO SOULFUL, AND THE CROWD'S MOOD WAS SO JOYOUS. IT WAS A TOP-NOTCH ORCHESTRAL PERFORMANCE. I WISH YOU COULD HAVE BEEN THERE TO OBSERVE IT WITH ME. PERHAPS WE CAN GO TOGETHER SOMETIME SOON?

OTHERWISE, THINGS HERE ARE OKAY. WORK IS OFTEN OVERWHELMING, BUT I TOOK A LONG WEEKEND TO GO ON A SHORT ROAD TRIP TO THE COAST. THE OCEAN WAS SOOTHING, AND THE COOL BREEZE WAS A LOVELY, OPPORTUNE CHANGE. I TOOK SO MANY PHOTOS OF THE ROCKS AND THE HORIZON.

I MUST GO NOW, AS I HAVE OTHER OBLIGATIONS TO ATTEND TO. PLEASE WRITE BACK OR CALL WHEN YOU CAN. I WOULD LOVE TO HEAR YOUR OWN NEWS AND STORIES.

YOUR GOOD FRIEND,

[YOUR NAME]
